##CSI EDUC.TEST.GLOBAL.CSI
GIM30801I LIST PROCESSING SUMMARY

TZONE1    DDDEF ENTRIES

LINKLIB   DATASET         = SYS1.LINKLIB
          SHR

TZONE2    DDDEF ENTRIES

SITELIB   DATASET         = MY.SITE.LINKLIB
          SHR

TZONE1    MOD ENTRIES

IGYCRCTL  LASTUPD         = HLA2280   TYPE=ADD
          LIBRARIES       = DISTLIB=AGYCLINK
          FMID            = HLA2280
IEBGENER  LASTUPD         = HBB7790   TYPE=ADD
          LIBRARIES       = DISTLIB=AGYCLINK
          FMID            = HBB7790

TZONE2    MOD ENTRIES

SAMPMOD   LASTUPD         = USER001   TYPE=ADD
          LIBRARIES       = DISTLIB=AUSRLINK
          FMID            = USER001
          RMID            = USER001
          LMOD            = SAMPMD1

TZONE1    SYSMOD ENTRIES

HLA2280   TYPE            = FUNCTION
          STATUS          = APPLIED
HBB7790   TYPE            = FUNCTION
          STATUS          = APPLIED

TZONE2    SYSMOD ENTRIES

USER001   TYPE            = FUNCTION
          STATUS          = APPLIED
